title: Master v0.5.8 Require Full Submission Items
notes:
Changes:
- Master now requires full item data before approving/merging a Dev submission.
- If a submission only has summary/preview, approval is blocked with a clear message.
- On approve, Master writes/repairs shared-dev/database.json from the full submission items immediately.
- Tester publish can then read shared-dev/database.json normally.
- Pending preview can show whether full items are included.
